All FAQ Questions

Labels and Ingredients

Why does ingredient order matter on herbal tea bags?

Ingredient order helps buyers understand which flavors or herbs dominate the blend.

DirectoryRead the first ingredients firstMatch the list to the routine

Read the first ingredients first

Ingredient lists usually show the main components before smaller supporting flavors. For herbal tea bags, that helps buyers understand whether the blend is mostly mint, ginger, hibiscus, chamomile, rooibos, spice, or fruit flavor.

Match the list to the routine

A strong first ingredient may be useful after meals or during work, while a lighter floral or fruit-led blend may be better for evening routines and gifts.
